ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short reference to Sisto Guarini see Luigi Napoleone Cittadella, I Guarini famiglia nobile ferrarese oriunda di Verona. Memorie. Bologna, 1870 (BL Shelfmark: 9904.i.45. )
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
